bigsignwriter.font.error.wrongLineCount: Either the character '%s' has an incorrect number of lines (%s), or the font's height has been misset (%s)!
bigsignwriter.font.error.unfixedWidth: Character '%s' does not have a fixed width! %s
bigsignwriter.config.fonts.createCopy.de: Saves a copy of this font to your fonts folder
bigsignwriter.config.buttonsX.desc: Horizontal offset for mod buttons, from center of screen.
bigsignwriter.config.buttonsY.desc: Vertical offset for mod buttons, from center of screen.
bigsignwriter.config.buttonsAlignmentX.d: Horizontal screen alignment for mod buttons (0%: left, 100%: right)
bigsignwriter.config.buttonsAlignmentY.d: Vertical screen alignment for mod buttons (0%: top, 100%: bottom)
bigsignwriter.config.fontSelectorCoversD: Disables the "Done" button when the font selector is open.
bigsignwriter.config.showConfigButton.de: Whether to show the config button next to the font selector
bigsignwriter.config.characterSeparatorO: Overrides the separator string to place between characters. Only active when enabled. Does not save between sessions.
Enables the character separator override. Does not save between sessions.
